tasks.subject: Task 1: Domain helpers — toCompleted() and findMatchingTaskInSection()
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure helpers: TaskMarker.toCompleted() and section-scoped task matcher distinguishing open/scheduled/completed matches.

**Files:** src/utils/taskMarker.ts, src/utils/tasks.ts, tests/unit/tasks.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/utils/taskMarker.ts", "src/utils/tasks.ts", "tests/unit/tasks.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm test -- tests/unit/tasks.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["toCompleted renders [x]", "section-scoped matching with open/scheduled/completed states", "prefers non-completed match"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: completeProjectTask command with integration tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The command: resolve project per task, mark project copy [x], append log entry (extract-log shape), complete source task in place.

**Files:** src/commands/completeProjectTask.ts, tests/helpers/completeProjectTaskPluginTestHelper.ts, tests/integration/completeProjectTask.plugin.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/commands/completeProjectTask.ts", "tests/helpers/completeProjectTaskPluginTestHelper.ts", "tests/integration/completeProjectTask.plugin.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["three-phase ordering", "mismatch best-effort behavior", "per-project grouping", "log entry shape"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Registration — command, hotkey c, CHANGELOG
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire the command into main.ts, HOTKEY_BINDINGS (key c), HotkeyModal COMMAND_REGISTRY; update hotkeyModal tests to 8 bindings; add Unreleased CHANGELOG entry.

**Files:** src/config.ts, src/ui/HotkeyModal.ts, src/main.ts, CHANGELOG.md, tests/unit/hotkeyModal.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/config.ts", "src/ui/HotkeyModal.ts", "src/main.ts", "CHANGELOG.md", "tests/unit/hotkeyModal.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm test && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["c binding works", "8 bindings", "CHANGELOG entry"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```
